title: Create pending_voice_intents table migration
description: Create database migration to add pending_voice_intents table with columns for chat_id, transcription, telegram_file_id, expires_at, and created_at with appropriate indexes
acceptance_criteria: pending_voice_intents.id: SERIAL PRIMARY KEY
pending_voice_intents.chat_id: BIGINT NOT NULL
pending_voice_intents.transcription: TEXT NOT NULL
pending_voice_intents.telegram_file_id: TEXT NOT NULL
pending_voice_intents.expires_at: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL
pending_voice_intents.created_at: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
Index idx_pending_voice_intents_chat_id exists on (chat_id)

title: Add OPENAI_API_KEY to environment configuration
description: Add OPENAI_API_KEY validation to shared environment configuration and update .env.example with documentation comment
acceptance_criteria: OPENAI_API_KEY is validated as required string in env schema
OPENAI_API_KEY is exported from validated environment config
.env.example contains OPENAI_API_KEY with explanatory comment

title: Implement voice transcription tool core function
description: Implement transcribe_voice_message function that downloads Telegram voice files and sends them to OpenAI Whisper API
acceptance_criteria: transcribe_voice_message function downloads Telegram voice file using bot token
Function sends audio file to OpenAI Whisper API with whisper-1 model
Function returns transcription text on success
Function handles network errors and API failures gracefully

title: Add voice transcription tool tests and validation
description: Add comprehensive tests for voice transcription tool including file validation and API response format checking
acceptance_criteria: Function validates file download and API response formats
Tests cover successful transcription scenarios
Tests cover network error handling
Tests cover API failure scenarios

title: Implement pending voice intent creation and reading
description: Implement create_pending_voice_intent and consume_pending_voice_intent functions for database operations
acceptance_criteria: create_pending_voice_intent function writes to pending_voice_intents table
Function sets expires_at to 5 minutes from creation time
consume_pending_voice_intent function reads and deletes intent by ID
Function returns null if intent is expired (expires_at in past)

title: Add pending voice intent management tests
description: Add tests for pending voice intent creation, reading, and expiration handling
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify intent creation with correct expiration time
Tests verify intent consumption and deletion
Tests verify expired intent handling
Tests verify null return for expired intents

title: Implement voice confirmation keyboard builder
description: Implement buildVoiceConfirmationKeyboard function to generate inline keyboards for voice message confirmations
acceptance_criteria: buildVoiceConfirmationKeyboard function creates inline keyboard
Keyboard contains 'Yes, do it' button with callback_data voice_yes_{id}
Keyboard contains 'No, cancel' button with callback_data voice_no_{id}
Function accepts intent ID parameter and embeds it in callback data

title: Add voice keyboard builder tests
description: Add tests for voice confirmation keyboard builder including format validation
acceptance_criteria: Keyboard layout matches Telegram inline keyboard format
Tests verify button text and callback data
Tests verify intent ID embedding in callback data
Tests cover edge cases for ID formatting

title: Implement voice message detection in bot handler
description: Extend bot message handler to detect incoming voice messages and transcribe them
acceptance_criteria: Bot detects message.voice property in incoming messages
Handler calls transcription tool with voice file data
Handler creates pending voice intent with transcription
Handler catches transcription errors and sends friendly error message

title: Add voice confirmation message and keyboard to bot handler
description: Extend bot handler to send confirmation messages with transcription text and voice confirmation keyboard
acceptance_criteria: Handler sends confirmation message with transcription text
Handler includes voice confirmation keyboard in reply
Tests verify message format and keyboard inclusion
Tests verify error message handling

title: Implement voice_yes callback handler
description: Implement callback handler for voice_yes action that manages pending intents and executes appropriate responses
acceptance_criteria: voice_yes callback handler loads pending intent by ID from callback data
Handler checks if intent is expired and sends expiry message if so
Handler deletes expired intents and stops processing
Handler forwards valid transcription to orchestrator with [voice] prefix

title: Implement voice_no callback handler and tests
description: Implement callback handler for voice_no action and add comprehensive tests for both callback handlers
acceptance_criteria: voice_no callback handler deletes pending intent and sends cancellation message
Both handlers properly parse intent ID from callback data
Tests verify intent loading and expiration checking
Tests verify message sending and intent deletion

title: Register voice tools in orchestrator agent
description: Add voice transcription and intent management tools to the orchestrator's agent tool registry
acceptance_criteria: Voice tools are imported and registered in agent tool definitions
transcribe_voice_message tool is available to agent
create_pending_voice_intent tool is available to agent
consume_pending_voice_intent tool is available to agent

title: Add voice tools integration tests
description: Add tests for voice tools integration with the orchestrator agent system
acceptance_criteria: Tools are properly typed and integrated with existing tool system
Tests verify tool availability in agent
Tests verify tool parameter validation
Tests verify tool execution in agent loop
